hindi: ॐ राजोवाच — त्वं नो ब्रूहि यथा शत्रोः, सुतीव्रादभिभूयते।
english: The king said: Tell us how one can overcome fierce enemies
roman: Om Rajo vacha — tvam no bruhi yatha shatroh sutivradabhibhuyate

hindi: नारायणकवचं तन्मे शुश्रूषोः शाधि यत् परम्॥
english: Tell me the supreme Narayana Kavach which I wish to hear
roman: Narayana kavacham tanme shushru shoh sadhi yat param

hindi: श्री शुक उवाच — राजन्यास्थाय शयने, शुचिर्यः प्रयतः पुमान्।
english: Shri Shuka said: O King, the pure man who with self-control, lying down, performs Nyasa
roman: Shri Shuka uvacha — Rajanyasthaya shayane shuchir yah prayatah puman

english: The wise one, placing this at his feet, worships Hari

hindi: ॐ विष्णवे नमः। ॐ नमो नारायणाय।
english: Om, salutations to Vishnu. Om, salutations to Narayana
roman: Om Vishnave namah. Om namo Narayanaya

hindi: हरिं पुरस्तादथ पृष्ठतश्च, हरिं च दक्षे पुरुषोत्तमं च।
english: Hari in front and Hari behind, and Hari on the right, the Supreme Person
roman: Harim purastadatha pristhatashcha Harim cha dakshe Purushottamam cha

english: Wherever on earth one goes, by meditating on your lotus feet
roman: Yatra yatra gato bhumau tvat padambuja bhaavanat

english: By the strength of Narayana's grace, may I be safe on the path
roman: Ksemo astu pathi yaamyaham Narayana kripa balat
